relationships: kab:Ur yessefk ara ad yettwaxdem kra deg way-agi﹖
kab:Ur yuklal ara ad s-tt-iẓer yiwen deg kra
kab:Yenna-d Tom belli ur yezmir ara ad isel ula i kra
kab:Bɣiɣ ad yili kra n yiwen i wumi ara meslayeɣ
kab:Ilaq ad tedduḍ yid-i kra n wass
kab:Yella kra ur neddi ara akken ilaq﹖
kab:S kra n win i t-yessnen akken ilaq yettqadar-it
kab:Dacu i yellan deg-s ma yella kra n yiwen i t-yeẓṛan﹖
kab:Tom akked Mary ttemwatan ɣef kra yellan
kab:Ulac kra i yellan deg wadig-is
kab:Yiwen n usurif amecṭuḥ yezmer ad ibeddel kra yellan
kab:Tom yella akked Mary kra yekka wass
kab:Tom akked Mary ttemwafaqen ɣef kra yellan
kab:Mary teẓra dakken la tsell i kra
kab:Ur yelli kra yellan deg yifassen-is
kab:Yexdem kra yellan di tezmert-is akken ad d-yawi akayad-ines
kab:Ur zmireɣ ara ad t-xedmeɣ mebla ma iɛawen-iyi kra n yiwen
kab:Bɣiɣ ad sleɣ kra yellan ɣef Mary
kab:Yal yiwen yessaram d akken kra n dir ur d-iḍerru
kab:Tom ur yexdim ula kra ur nlaq ara ad t-yexdem
kab:Llant kra n tɣawsiwin ur zmiren ara ad tent-id-sɣen yidrimen
kab:Ur zmireɣ ara ad t-xedmeɣ mebla ma tɛawen-iyi kra n yiwet
kab:Yenna-d Tom dakken yesɛa kra ad k-t-id yefk
kab:Yenna-d Tom dakken yesɛa kra ad kent-t-id yefk
kab:Tom d Mary ɣur-sen kra imdukal di Canada
kab:Sami ur yeẓri kra deg wayen i ḍeṛṛun dagi
